feed.title: SAP Community - Governance, Risk, Compliance (GRC), and Cybersecurity
feed.subtitle: Governance, Risk, Compliance (GRC), and Cybersecurity Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Legal regulation inactive for specific country (ECC vs. Hana)
entry.content:
Dear experts,

in "old" ECC system we could specify per receiving country if a legal regulation is active or not within following customizing path:

Sales and Distribution - Foreign Trade/Customs - Legal Control - Define Product Classification by Destination Country

Like highlighted in the screenshot no License Type is stated for Destination country CH but for country CL.

Effect is that for CH no License is required, but for CL it is required.

Question now related to new S/4 HANA system without SAP GTS, do we have such a possibility here as well?

Within Customizing (path: Governance, Risk and Compliance - International Trade - Legal Control) I do not see such a setting:

Any hint here would be really helpful. thanks in advance.

Best regards

 

Patrick

entry.title: SNC name GRC access request - Two or More Domains
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Current Set Up: -

Currently we have an SNC name updated at below location.

Go to SPRO-->Governance, Risk and Compliance-->Access Control-->User Provisioning-->

Maintain End User Personalization-->Maintain EUP Fields-->We can customize the settings for SNC field here.

for example: -

p:#!#USERID#!#@xxxx.xxxxxx.xxx

New requirement: -

We have new domain added as for example " p:#!#USERID#!#@xxxxxxxxxxx.xxxxxxxxx.xxxxx " for new set of users.

Question A: -

Can this be added at the same location at " Go to SPRO-->Governance, Risk and Compliance-->Access Control-->User Provisioning-->

Maintain End User Personalization-->Maintain EUP Fields-->We can customize the settings for SNC field here " as: -

SNC name 1 = p:#!#USERID#!#@xxxx.xxxxxx.xxxx

SNC name 2 = p:#!#USERID#!#@xxxxxxxxxxx.xxxxxxxxx.xxxxxx

Is this valid entry ?

Question B: -

Is there a field which can be used to identifier or differentiator between user id's of domain 1 who should be updated with SNC name 1

And

Another set of user id's of domain 2 who should be updated with SNC name 2.

Thanks raj

entry.title: SAP Security and GRC
entry.content: Hi All ,

entry.title: GRC HR Trigger considers all Plugin system for Change/Termination Access Requests
entry.content:
Dear Gurus/Experts,

We have GRC AC 12.0 HR Trigger Standard Functionality Implemented in the system and have multiple plugin systems, we are using GRC->AC->Maintain AC Apps & BRF+ Func. Mapping HR Trigger function. GRC is working fine for Action "New Hire" (New user to system and mapping of Roles as per position), whereas in termination/change of employee cases, Action "Terminate" OR "Change" employee. GRC considers again all of the plugin system for Access Request, result of which requests are reaching Escape Route since user does not always exist in all Plugin systems.

What can be done so that GRC will only consider systems as per position mapping OR where user exists for Termination/Change employee Actions?

Note: We know its necessary, but all the config details cannot be added here. Let me know if you can point out the required one, I should provide.

Thanks in Advance!

Thanks

entry.title: How to manage Mitigation Control assignment Approval workflow in GRC-IAG Bridge ?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We are working with customer and have the below scenario encountered, Please help us understand what would be the appropriate way to move forward in this IAG-GRC AC Bridge scenario :

Scenario : Customer will have bridge scenario of GRC-IAG, Access request feature will be utilized from GRC AC Access request form for cloud and on-premise systems ( AS-IS : Mitigation Control approval workflow is currently in activate state for GRC AC which triggers on assignment of Mitigation Control to owner for approval during access request in case of On-premise systems)

Note : Access Control Risk Definition synchronization job & Access Control Mitigation Control Transfer job are instructed to run only once for syncing data from GRC AC to IAG to fetch data and recommended to start the maintenance of Risk and Mitigation data for both On-Premise & Cloud IAG moving forward in IAG.

Question : How to manage mitigation control assignment workflow for Cloud and On-Premise risk in GRC AC Access Request Form if mitigation data would be coming from IAG as runtime for cloud and on-premise systems, Customer wants to continue with Mitigation control approval workflow which is critical for business.

Regards

Asit Kumar Behera

entry.title: GRC integration with OKTA for user data source
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a Okta server where our client store user information, whenever any user join's the organization his/her data is stored in okta and samaccount/email is created for users.

As you must be knowing OKTA is a identity solution where user details are stored, we want to use OKTA as users data source.

We want to understand if GRC support OKTA tool as a part of integration or not.

If GRC doesn't support OKTA then can we integrate OKTA with IAG using IAS/IPS then we can use IAG as a bridge with GRC where we want user's data along with manger/supervisor.

We are also using OKTA as Corporate Idp via SAP IAS. for SSO for all system like SAC, IBP, S4, BTP etc

Please provide the solution for above scenarios how we can integrate OKTA with GRC or IAG.

Regards,
Surya Pratap Singh

entry.title: Hi , Does any know why we see " in the request" value in environment tab for GRC Business role?
entry.content:
We are seeing "in the request" value apart from production for the business role provisioning to the users in SAP GRC.

Anyone know what is that value and what are the repercussions because of that?

entry.title: SAP GRC New Certification Launch
entry.content:
Hi, 

Does anyone have an idea when SAP will launch SAP GRC new Certification? 

The old certification has been on hold for quite time. 

Would appreciate an early response. Thanks.

Regards,

Wajahat 

#grc #

entry.title: GRC 12.0 Integration with S4HANA RISE (Private Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi Team

Can we connect GRC 12.0 with S4HANA RISE (Private Cloud or Public Cloud) without IAG or IAG Bridge.

Also, please advise if there exist a blog or Snote that describes. 

Regards

NG

entry.title: After giving reason in Fire Fighter popup doesn't close and doesn't give connecting system.
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have newly installed SAP AC 12.0 SP 25 for S4HANA.

The issue is after giving reason in FireFighter popup doesn't close and doesn't give connecting system.

entry.title: SAP internship in cybersecurity
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am looking for a long-term internship for the second year of my master's program in Cybersecurity, which will be next year. If you have any information about long-term internship opportunities in SAP for cybersecurity students or anything you can help me with, please do not hesitate to reply.

Thank you.

entry.title: UAR process vs default roles in sap GRC
entry.content:
Hi All,

Good day.

Not sure its a right thought. 

While we apply the right process in place, if we see some simplifications,  

 

The UAR process we have is that, the reviewers are doing checks based on role matrix given to them and based on that, reviewers are approving or rejecting the additional/unwanted role assignments in UAR reviews. 

But is it possible, for example, to upload the default roles set based on user groups and based on that, the auto comparison should happen and only those roles having extra should only go for reviews ? Remaining all (as per matrix) should get auto approved ?  

If possible, Could you give some thoughts how to perform this or similar to this ?  

 

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP reports for deleting Inactive users
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm keen to know if there is a report in SAP which we can schedule to delete inactive users ( User who have never logged in) in SAP? If there is a way to achieve this through SAP GRC?

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Nandita

entry.title: Is it a good decision for someone without an IT background to learn SAP Security GRC?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have 5.3 years of experience working in an MNC in a non-IT role (BPO), and I am now looking to shift my career towards IT, specifically in SAP Security GRC, for better growth opportunities. I am not interested in programming languages, and have found limited opportunities in my current field.

I would greatly appreciate insights from individuals who have transitioned into SAP Security GRC from non-IT backgrounds or from those currently working in this domain. Is it a good decision to pursue SAP Security GRC for long-term career growth?

Additionally, I would like to know:

1. What is the average salary package for someone with 3 to 3.5 years of experience in SAP Security GRC?
    Are there any current job openings for candidates with this level of experience? What is the demand for            SAP Security GRC professionals in the market?
2. Are there opportunities for freshers in this field?
3. Could you recommend any reputable training institutes in Hyderabad for SAP Security GRC with contacts?
4. Is certification required after completing the course, and if so, what is the cost?
5. Is any programming knowledge (like Java, Python, etc.) required to learn SAP Security GRC? Is it a "no            coding" field?
6. Is certification necessary to get job calls and Interviews? If so, what is the certification fee?

Looking forward to your valuable feedback.

Regards,
Sridhar.

entry.title: Excluding a Business Role from UAR Data Generation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We use GRC Business Roles for access provisioning with single / derived roles grouped in these business roles. We run the UAR on the business roles as these are assigned to users, and the UAR config is such that the Business Role owner is the approver. 

We have a requirement to exclude one specific role from the review (this is a Business Role that assigned to all the users and we do not want to review that). In the UAR data generation job, we tried to filter out this role by using 'Role Name - is not' criteria. But the UAR data is still generated for this role. I also tried the program 'GRAC_UAR_REQUEST_GEN' and excluded the Business Role, but no luck. 

Any idea how we can exclude one or more Business Roles from the UAR data generation, apart from adding the rest of the roles in the 'Role Name is' filter?

Thanks in advance.

Hari

#Governance, Risk, Compliance (GRC), and Cybersecurity

entry.title: S/4 HANA License check for specified products
entry.content:
Hi Experts

SAP S/4 HANA provides for a basic framework to check for legal control and license checks. A functionality is provided to indicate if the license type is checked based on Products or is based on a control class.

We have a requirement where only specific products are subject to a license check. All other products do not require a license check should not be subject to a license check in the sales order.

If we define a license type which is based on products / control class, the items that are relevant for a license check would be managed via the license type relevant for these parameters.

However, since all other products are not subject to a license requirement, there is a need that such materials are not subject to a license requirement for the legal control activated for the country. 

How do we achieve this exclusion so that products that are not required for a license check are not expected to be maintained in a different license type ? Maintaining a wider list of products that are not subject to a license check would be a huge maintenance issue.

Would appreciate inputs from experts in the forum. 

Regards

Rohit Zalani

entry.title: Examples for Technical and Functional upgrade in GRC
entry.content: Please provide some Instances or scenarios for Technical and Functional upgrade in GRC

entry.title: Can an SAP GRC S/4HANA system communicate with a non-Unicode SAP system?
entry.content:
Can an SAP GRC S/4HANA system communicate with a non-Unicode SAP system?

Or must the non-Unicode SAP system be converted to Unicode first?

entry.title: Enabling Auto Provisioning GRC AC Workflow
entry.content:
Hello,

I have 3 default roles all users should get, and they should not require approval to be provisioned. I would like to enable auto provisioning for roles without role owners, but then that opens up a risk of roles being assigned that are outside of our design (SAP standard delivered roles, etc). that have no role owner.

Is there any setup up where I can avoid this and still accomplish what I am looking to do.

entry.title: How will GRC-Focused Consultancies adapt to the New SAP Partner Points System for Gold logo?
entry.content:
With the recent changes to the SAP Partner Points system, consultancies focused on Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) modules (e.g., AC, PC, RM, AM) are facing a significant challenge. The new framework no longer includes certifications related to GRC, and the points are now solely awarded for expertise in functional modules (BackOffice).

This leaves many GRC-specialized consultancies, like the one I work with, in a difficult position. It’s unclear how a consultancy focused exclusively on GRC can accumulate enough points to maintain its Gold Partner status under this new model. Does anyone have insights into how consultancies in this niche can navigate these changes? Are there plans from SAP to introduce GRC-related certifications or new ways for GRC-focused firms to earn the necessary points?
